data.name: 新婚人妻NTR
data.detailed_description:
為了保住婚姻而不得不接受NTR的表姐！

你出生於一個名門大族，家裡規矩非常森嚴，族長的權威是最高的。
你的表姐小甜是家族的繼承人，美麗大方的她，從小就是你的夢中情人。
雖然曾經偷取表姐的內衣而被家族懲罰5年不准靠近表姐，但是你依然對她念念不忘。
如今表姐已經結婚了，過上了幸福的新婚生活，但是在家族的聚會上卻被族長奶奶叫了出去。
原來，表姐的丈夫是個無法硬起來的軟蛋，到現在為止，表姐還沒成功的過上夫妻生活！
因為表姐是家族的繼承人，必須要跟無法生育的丈夫離婚。
想保住自己婚姻的表姐，不得不接受族長的要求......

那就是跟身為表弟的你嘿嘿來懷上家族的繼承人！
想想就刺激，這不是奉命NTR嗎？還有這種好事？
就這樣，把小甜表姐的身體和心靈都從他丈夫旁邊睡走吧！


  • 從原裝日本VN本地化。
  • 小甜表姐使帶有日文語音。
  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質。
  • 多小時的內容。
  • 帶有音樂和音效。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。
  • 14個與人妻H的劇情。

「新婚人妻NTR」是一個英文本地化的VN，由著名日本製作室 Norn/Miel所創作。我們在cherry kiss櫻桃社試圖將日本遊戲帶到全世界。

**注意**
所有角色的描述和圖片都屬成人並沒有任何未成年人物用於這遊戲裡。

data.short_description: 為了保住婚姻而不得不接受NTR的表姐！因為表姐夫遲遲都無法讓表姐懷孕，所以要男主代替表姐夫完成這一任務，而不願意離婚的表姐也真誠的請求男主。得償所願的男主，要求表姐對自己付出忠誠，開始將她調教成受孕奴隸...
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OSX 10.6+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: My Married Cousin's Need for Seed
data.detailed_description:
The only good part about attending your boring family meetups is that you get to ogle your hot cousin, Nodoka. But this time she brought back her stupid handsome husband to spoil the mood. While lamenting your cousin's married status, your great grandmother calls you and Nodoka away for a private conversation. She drops a BOMB! Turns out your cousin's husband is impotent and granny wants to see some babies coming from your Nodoka ASAP. Great grandmother wants you to be the one to get her pregnant!

Seizing the opportunity to finally get Nodoka's hot body all to yourself, you'll take your job knocking her up very seriously. Fuck her like her loser husband never could and make her fall in love with your cock and forget about that limp dick guy. Take her every chance you get; blowjobs as soon as she comes through the door, go to the park in nothing but a string bikini and fuck her out in the open, tie her up with ropes and leashes until she begs you to fuck her more and more until she is all yours.


  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Nodoka is fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • 14 scenes of sculpting Nodoka into the perfect sex toy!

    My Married Cousin's Need for Seed is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer MIel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

    **PLEASE NOTE**
    All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.
